title: trichilia tuberculata subsp. lanceolata
intro: Trichilia tuberculata subsp. lanceolata, commonly known as the Lanceolate Yellowwood or Yellowwood, is a plant species belonging to the family Meliaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Trichilia tuberculata subsp. lanceolata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are also used in the form of salves or ointments to treat various health conditions.
